scenes.on_screen_text:
SLOW SPANISH PRACTICE
FOR PEOPLE WHO WANT
TO SPEAK CONFIDENTLY.
I SPEAK SLOWLY.
I PAUSE.
YOU REPEAT.
NO RUSH.
NO PRESSURE.
NO JUDGMENT.
JUST YOU,
YOUR VOICE
AND REAL SPANISH PRACTICE.
LITTLE BY LITTLE,
YOUR CONFIDENCE GROWS.
UNTIL ONE DAY
YOU REALIZE
YOU'RE ACTUALLY SPEAKING.
PRACTICE REAL CONVERSATIONS WITH SPEAK.
